relationship.description: A station can participate in many station‑network relationship records
A network can be linked to many stations through relationship records
A GIS system (if used) can be associated with many station‑network relationship records; the reference is optional

metadata.improvements_made: Added explicit primary‑key definitions (station_id PK, network_id PK, composite PK (station_id, network_id, effective_start) for STATION_NETWORK). Declared foreign‑key constraints via relationships. Introduced optional GIS_SYSTEM entity with nullable gis_system_id in STATION_NETWORK to capture system‑level audit without mandatory complexity. Documented a check constraint ensuring effective_start < effective_end. Standardized naming to snake_case and clarified cardinalities.
